name: Navajo Fry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together.
2. Gradually add water to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
3. Knead the dough on a floured surface until it becomes smooth and elastic.
4. Cover the dough and let it rest for 10 minutes.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/2 inch.
6. Cut the dough into squares or circles using a sharp knife.
7. Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 370°F (190°C).
8. Carefully lower the dough pieces into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, turning occasionally.
9. Remove the fried bread with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
10. Drizzle honey over the warm fry bread and serve immediately.
